title: Remove Licensed & Insured tab and related text

requirements.summary: Remove the 'Licensed & Insured' tab/badge from the Navigation bar and any trust badges section where it appears
acceptanceCriteria: No element with the label 'Licensed & Insured' appears anywhere on the page.
Remaining tabs/badges are unaffected and display correctly.

file_operations.description: Remove any navigation link, tab, or menu item with the label 'Licensed & Insured' from the navigation bar. Ensure all remaining navigation elements continue to function correctly and maintain proper spacing.

Remove any trust badge or element displaying 'Licensed & Insured' from the trust badges section and any other location in the About component. Ensure the remaining trust badges display correctly without empty gaps or broken layout.

requirements.summary: Remove all occurrences of the text 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' from the page
acceptanceCriteria: The phrase 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' does not appear anywhere on the page.
No other licensing-related badge or text referencing this content remains visible.
Surrounding layout remains intact and does not show empty gaps or broken spacing.

file_operations.description: Remove all instances of the text 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' including any section descriptions, sub-labels, or supporting text that references licensing, bonding, or insurance. Maintain proper layout and spacing for remaining content.

Search for and remove any occurrence of 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' or similar licensing-related text in the hero section. Ensure the hero layout remains visually intact.

Search for and remove any occurrence of 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' or similar licensing-related text in the footer section. Maintain proper footer structure and spacing.

Search for and remove any occurrence of 'Fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind' or similar licensing-related text in the services section. Ensure service cards and layout remain properly structured.
